code: import{useMemo}from'react';import{getCookie,setCookie}from'../helpers/CookieHelpers';var LANGUAGE_COOKIE_KEY='APP_LANGUAGE';var DEFAULT_FALLBACK_LANGUAGE=window.location.hostname==='cn.chowispartner.com'?'zh':'kr';export var APP_LANGUAGES=[{code:'kr',value:'한국어'},{code:'en',value:'English'},{code:'jp',value:'日本'},{code:'ru',value:'Pусский'},{code:'zh',value:'简体中文'},{code:'zf',value:'繁体中文'}];export function useAppLanguage(){var fallback=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:DEFAULT_FALLBACK_LANGUAGE;var currentLanguage=useMemo(function(){return getCookie(LANGUAGE_COOKIE_KEY)||fallback;},[fallback]);var setLanguage=function setLanguage(language){setCookie(LANGUAGE_COOKIE_KEY,language);window.location.reload();};return[currentLanguage,setLanguage];}
